name: Reality Stars
description: Reality TV personalities, shows, and watercooler moments

questions.q: Which businessman turned President was the longtime host and executive producer of the US version of 'The Apprentice'?

source.notes: Hosted from 2004 until 2015 — replaced by Arnold Schwarzenegger for one season in 2017.

questions.q: Kim Kardashian's 2011 marriage to NBA player Kris Humphries lasted how many days?

source.notes: Kardashian filed for divorce 72 days after the August 2011 wedding.

questions.q: Kris Humphries, briefly married to Kim Kardashian, plays which sport professionally?

source.notes: NBA journeyman; played for the Nets, Celtics, and others.

questions.q: The MTV reality show 'The Hills' was a spin-off of which earlier series?

source.notes: Followed Lauren Conrad from Laguna Beach to Los Angeles.

questions.q: The early-2000s MTV reality show 'Newlyweds' chronicled the marriage of Nick Lachey and which pop singer?

source.notes: Ran 2003–2005 on MTV.

questions.q: The long-running reality series 'Duck Dynasty' featured the lives of which Louisiana family and their duck-call business?

source.notes: Phil, Jase, Willie, and Jep Robertson. Aired on A&E 2012–2017.

questions.q: Demanding dance teacher Abby Lee Miller is the star of which Lifetime reality show?
choices: So You Think You Can Dance

source.notes: Based at her studio in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.

questions.q: Who was the first winner of the US version of 'The Apprentice' in 2004?

source.notes: Rancic is married to TV host Giuliana Rancic.

questions.q: Who was the style mentor on 'Project Runway' for many seasons, famous for urging designers to 'make it work'?

source.notes: Hosted by Heidi Klum; Gunn served as mentor 2004–2017.

questions.q: What is the real first name of 'Jersey Shore' star 'Snooki'?

source.notes: Full name: Nicole Polizzi.

questions.q: What is the real name of 'Jersey Shore' cast member 'The Situation'?

source.notes: Real name Michael Sorrentino; co-stars included Pauly D, JWoww, and Snooki.

questions.q: Restaurateur Lisa Vanderpump was a breakout star on which 'Real Housewives' city?

source.notes: Owns restaurants SUR, Villa Blanca, and Pump; spun off 'Vanderpump Rules'.

questions.q: Which pop star served as a judge on the US version of 'The X Factor' in 2012?

source.notes: Paired with Demi Lovato, L.A. Reid, and Simon Cowell.

questions.q: Which 1990s rapper competed on 'Dancing on Ice' in 2011?

source.notes: Competed on the UK series 'Dancing on Ice'.

questions.q: Which first-season 'Apprentice' contestant later joined the Trump White House as a Communications aide?

source.notes: Served as Director of Communications for the Office of Public Liaison, 2017.

questions.q: Teen reality star Farrah Abraham first rose to fame on which MTV show?

source.notes: Featured on '16 and Pregnant' and then 'Teen Mom'.

questions.q: Who was the longtime host of the US version of 'Dancing with the Stars', from its 2005 debut until 2019?

source.notes: Also hosted 'America's Funniest Home Videos' for many years.

questions.q: Action star Steven Seagal appeared on a reality show on A&E in which actual law-enforcement role?

source.notes: 'Steven Seagal: Lawman' followed his reserve work with the Jefferson Parish Sheriff's Office.

questions.q: Comedian Kathy Griffin starred in the Bravo reality show titled 'My Life on the...' what?

source.notes: Won two Emmys for Outstanding Reality Program; ran 2005–2010.

questions.q: Jade Goody was a 'Big Brother' star from which country, whose public battle with cancer made headlines?

source.notes: Contestant on UK's Big Brother 3 (2002); died of cervical cancer in 2009 at age 27.

questions.q: Anna Nicole Smith was for years the spokesperson for which dubious diet product?

source.notes: Signed with TrimSpa in 2003; 'Be envied!' was the tagline.

questions.q: Which actress won the first season of 'Dancing with the Stars' in 2005?

source.notes: Monaco is best known for playing Sam McCall on General Hospital.
